invariants.text: !found ==> forall a': int, b': int {:trigger ValidPair(a', b', x)} :: 1 <= a' < ai && 1 <= b' <= x ==> !ValidPair(a', b', x)

assertions.text: forall b': int {:trigger ValidPair(ai, b', x)} :: ai < b' <= x ==> !ValidPair(ai, b', x)
